target_idiom: กระดี่ได้น้ำ
source_meaning: full of the joys of spring
target_meaning: An overjoyed person.

target_idiom: กองทัพเดินด้วยท้อง
source_meaning: the way to a man's heart is through his stomach
target_meaning: An army marches on its stomach.

target_idiom: การปัดฝุ่น
source_meaning: dust devil (small atmospheric vortex appearing in clear, dry conditions, made visible by swirling dust picked up from the ground)
target_meaning: abstract noun of ปัดฝุ่น (bpàt-fùn)

source_idiom: jak cię widzą, tak cię piszą
target_idiom: ไก่งามเพราะขน คนงามเพราะแต่ง
source_meaning: fine feathers make fine birds (something that appears beautiful or good is by definition beautiful or good)
target_meaning: Fine features make fine birds. / Good clothes open all doors.

target_idiom: แก้วลืมคอน
source_meaning: grass widower (married man whose spouse is away)
target_meaning: A person who forgets his home or family in a rural area after living in an urban area.

target_idiom: ไก่โห่
source_meaning: scarecrow (effigy fixed to a pole in a field to deter birds from eating crops or seeds planted there)
target_meaning: cockcrow.

target_idiom: ไก่เห็นตีนงู งูเห็นนมไก่
source_meaning: to be thick as thieves (to be very familiar with someone; to know someone for a very long time) [ (+ instrumental) ]
target_meaning: persons who see through each other; persons who know the secrets of each other.

target_idiom: ขมิ้นกับปูน
source_meaning: to fight like cats and dogs (to fight frequently or irreconcilably)
target_meaning: incompatible; irreconcilable; disagreeing; typified by arguments, fights, or disagreements.

target_idiom: คว่ำบาตร
source_meaning: to vote with one's wallet
target_meaning: to boycott

target_idiom: เจ้าใหญ่นายโต
source_meaning: high society, jet set, the quality, upper crust
target_meaning: person of high authority or rank; elite; power elite; member of the ruling class; high-ranking noble or royal person.

target_idiom: เจาะไข่แดง
source_meaning: to have sex
target_meaning: to take a woman's virginity; to pop someone's cherry.

target_idiom: ใจหิน
source_meaning: heart of stone
target_meaning: stonyhearted; hardhearted.

target_idiom: ได้หน้า
source_meaning: to praise to the skies (to praise a lot)
target_meaning: to receive good reputation, honour, credit, praise, compliment, etc.

target_idiom: ตาถั่ว
source_meaning: blind drunk (so intoxicated as to appear to have difficulty seeing)
target_meaning: unable to see or find things even though one has good eyes.

target_idiom: ติดหู
source_meaning: to catch the ear
target_meaning: ear-catching; catchy; memorable.

target_idiom: ถอนรากถอนโคน
source_meaning: to raze to the ground
target_meaning: to uproot; to annihilate; to exterminate.

target_idiom: ทำนาบนหลังคน
source_meaning: to severely fuck over; to ruthlessly exploit someone
target_meaning: to derive benefit from other's suffering; to make money from other's suffering; to enrich oneself at other's expense; to make money by oppressive means.

target_idiom: ทุกหย่อมหญ้า
source_meaning: from everywhere
target_meaning: everywhere; every place; all places; all regions; all districts; universally; generally

target_idiom: น้ำบ่อน้อย
source_meaning: baby tooth, milk tooth
target_meaning: saliva

target_idiom: บั่นทอน
source_meaning: to feel down, to be in low spirits (to feel unhappy)
target_meaning: to discourage; to dispirit; to dishearten.

target_idiom: ปลาหมอตายเพราะปาก
source_meaning: my word (used when the speaker wants to express surprise at suddenly finding himself in an undesirable and embarrassing situation)
target_meaning: one who is ruined because of one's own careless remark or speaking.

target_idiom: ปัดฝุ่น
source_meaning: to gather dust (to remain unused for a long period of time)
target_meaning: to dust off: to take out or prepare for use again after a period of inactivity or storage.

target_idiom: ไม่ได้ด้วยเล่ห์ก็เอาด้วยกล ไม่ได้ด้วยมนต์ก็เอาด้วยคาถา
source_meaning: at all costs
target_meaning: to use any method possible.

target_idiom: ไม่เผาผี
source_meaning: used to express complete disregard for someone or something
target_meaning: to utterly hate someone; to have utter hatred, anger, or revenge towards someone.

target_idiom: ร่มเย็น
source_meaning: peace and quiet
target_meaning: calm and serene; peaceful; being at peace; being at ease; free from disturbance, trouble, anxiety, or the like.

target_idiom: ร้าวฉาน
source_meaning: open fracture, compound fracture, effraction (fracture of a bone where one or more bone fragments penetrate the skin, forming an open wound)
target_meaning: ruptured; breached; broken.

source_idiom: złej tanecznicy zawadza rąbek u spódnicy
target_idiom: รำไม่ดีโทษปี่โทษกลอง
source_meaning: a bad workman always blames his tools
target_meaning: a bad workman always blames his tools (blame another person for one's own fault).

target_idiom: เลื่อยขาเก้าอี้
source_meaning: to remove from office (to force someone out of an official position)
target_meaning: to unseat; to dethrone; to topple

target_idiom: เลือดเนื้อเชื้อไข
source_meaning: blood relationship (state of being related by “blood”, i.e. genetically)
target_meaning: biological descendant, as biological child, biological grandchild, etc.

target_idiom: วัวหายล้อมคอก
source_meaning: too little too late (of an action undertaken too late to be effective)
target_meaning: to close the stable door after the horse has bolted.

target_idiom: ส่งไม้ต่อ
source_meaning: to give way (to be followed, succeeded, or replaced by)
target_meaning: to let someone do or be something as one's successor; to pass (a role, position, office, etc) to someone; to pass (on) the torch.

target_idiom: สร้างภาพ
source_meaning: to keep up appearances (to pretend to be all right or that everything is going well; to maintain an appearance of wealth, comfort, or propriety)
target_meaning: to create, publish, or promote a good image (of, about, etc); to propagandise (a good point of); to pretend, to act, or to put on an act (to make oneself, someone, or something look good); to be pretentious, fake, insincere, ingenuine, or hypocritic.

target_idiom: สายป่าน
source_meaning: grist for the mill (something conducive to someone's plans or expectations)
target_meaning: resources, especially for use in producing more wealth or advancing a project.

target_idiom: สาวไส้
source_meaning: to wash one's dirty laundry in public, to wash one's dirty linen in public
target_meaning: to air someone's private problems.

target_idiom: หนีเสือปะจระเข้
source_meaning: to jump out of the frying pan, into the fire
target_meaning: to escape from one bad situation only to meet another bad situation.

target_idiom: หนูตกถังข้าวสาร
source_meaning: poor relation
target_meaning: poor man who gets a wealthy wife; poor man who marries into a wealthy family; man who marries a woman that has much higher financial status.

target_idiom: หมากัดอย่ากัดตอบ
source_meaning: bad people do not get hurt
target_meaning: do not lower yourself to give any response to those who speak ill of you; do not fight with people of low character when they hurts you.

target_idiom: หมาไม่แดก
source_meaning: used to describe something that the speaker feels is disgusting because it is dirty, neglected, broken or of very poor quality
target_meaning: extremely undelicious; very unpleasant to the taste.

target_idiom: หักหลัง
source_meaning: to stab in the back
target_meaning: to betray.

target_idiom: หูหนวกตาบอด
source_meaning: deaf as a post
target_meaning: deaf and blind: unwilling or refusing to perceive or understand; lacking perception, awareness, or judgement; not controlled by reason.

target_idiom: เหลือขอ
source_meaning: stubbornly, obstinately
target_meaning: stubborn

target_idiom: ออกร้าน
source_meaning: amusement park, fairground, funhouse, theme park (commercially-operated collection of rides, games and other entertainment attractions)
target_meaning: to open a booth or stall (at an exhibition, festival, fair, or the like).
